author: zanepeycke
name: PR1797 lineage + 240-shard limit + BOS-masked SmearGate + phase-4 TTT
blurb: Conservative submission candidate based on the legal PR #1787/#1797 CaseOps + SparseAttnGate + SmearGate + asymmetric LQER lineage. Pins training to the first 240 canonical CaseOps train shards, masks SmearGate at BOS document boundaries in both normal and TTT paths, and uses TTT_LORA_LR=5e-5 with four phased score-before-update TTT phases. End-to-end 3-seed full-validation result: 1.06654079 BPB mean, std 0.00122292, max artifact 15,950,966 bytes.
reproducibility_notes: Run prepare_caseops_data.py once to tokenize canonical FineWeb into the CaseOps shards and byte sidecar. train_gpt.py applies TRAIN_SHARD_LIMIT=240 by default, then runs the PR #1797 base stack with BOS-masked SmearGate, asymmetric LQER, and legal phased TTT. README.md contains the exact measured run command.
